textByHash.dfb0059e28ee5cb30ab2dac37314a487f5976b6f: I'm making sure only those with a competition pass enter the fishing contest.
textByHash.d2c196ac81f0f61d41561efbfae2b2ff0a2ffcc9: Move on through. Talk to Bonzo to enter the competition.
textByHash.21c55fb11f96b54c297bf0efde489cb8d1711d12: Whitefish, eh? Okay, since you've won the competition before, I'll let you in.
textByHash.2c564661dc2e1d8c80d2da601a465437b5a95409: Oh well. I can't let you past then.
textByHash.0df58e275eb6edbf9362fba772b302b83d91f7a4: This is the entrance to the Hemenster fishing competition. It's a high class competition. Invitation only.
